## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change made to address it.

## Validation

List the exact commands run and their outcomes.

```text
# command -> result
```

## Experimental impact

If results can change, state the task, condition, split, sample count, seeds, checkpoint selection rule, metrics, and hardware. Otherwise write “No expected experimental impact.”

## Checklist

- [ ] The pull request has one clear purpose.
- [ ] Source files compile and relevant smoke checks pass.
- [ ] Documentation and CLI help remain accurate.
- [ ] No datasets, checkpoints, generated results, W&B state, or LaTeX build products were added.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, private URLs, or sensitive metadata were added.
- [ ] Backward compatibility and checkpoint-format effects are documented.
